response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on engineer with nearly two decades of experience, genuine high-scale production work (millions of requests per second at dunnhumby/Sociomantic), and recent AI-tooling experience that matches the AI-first framing. However, the role's core domain — experimentation platforms, growth measurement, telemetry, feature flighting, and statistical analysis — is essentially absent from his background, and his career at small-to-mid-size companies in senior/staff IC roles does not demonstrate the multi-workstream, cross-org technical leadership expected at Principal/IC6 level in an enterprise setting.
strengths: Strong, broad engineering fundamentals across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems, including services handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic developer tooling), directly matching the preferred AI-velocity qualification
Proven builder of developer tooling and testing frameworks with a mentoring/teaching track record (workshops, courses, open-source test libraries)
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth/measurement platform experience — the central domain of the role
No evidence of Principal-level scope: career is senior/staff IC roles at small companies, without multi-team, multi-workstream initiative leadership at enterprise scale
Little demonstrated depth in metrics, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis required for high data aptitude

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal/IC6 enterprise scope
Strong fundamentals with high-scale systems and AI tooling
